title: An Alternate Psychic

burnout.label: Burnout
burnout.description: A burnout action pushes your mind to its limit. You can only use burnout actions while your psyche is unleashed. Immediately after you use a burnout action, you expend all of your remaining Focus Points and unleash psyche ends. You then can’t use burnout actions again until you make your daily preparations or Refocus.

description: An alternate take on the Psychic class for Pathfinder Second Edition, reworking Unleash Psyche, amps, and many of the class's feats.
